title: Crunchy Spicy Philippine Sausage Stir-fry
description: A low-carb, spicy Filipino dish featuring crispy sausage stir-fried with a tangy sauce and vegetables for a satisfying solo dinner.

ingredients.name: 3 slices of Filipino chorizo or similar sausage

instructions: Preheat your broiler to high heat.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add sausage slices and cook until crispy, about 3 minutes per side.
Remove sausage from pan and set aside. Increase heat to very high.
Add bell pepper slices and onion to the hot pan with some oil. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until softened.
Add garlic and broccoli; stir well and cook for another minute.
Pour in lime juice, stir quickly to combine all ingredients.
Return cooked sausage to the pan, toss everything together, and broil for about 1 minute or until everything is heated through and slightly crispy.
Serve hot as a light dinner.
